message:
fix(scope_tree): restore count_by_state assertion replacing nonexistent take_events call

The ephemeral_scope test was broken by a stale take_events() call on
ScopeTree (method does not exist). Restored the original assertion
using count_by_state(Closed). Also includes concurrent agent changes
to build_coord, byte_compression, cancellation, capacity_governor,
policy, scope_watchdog, mux_client_ops bench, and runtime_compat
surface guard — all verified to compile and pass tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
